focus: security - reducer and extractor safety review

results.notes: Emit path remains reducer-owned and opt-out aware.
No shell/network or traversal regression observed.

detail: Security pass produced no findings; extractor remains pure fs/path logic and reducers gate emission behind explicit CLI/config switches.

direction: Shell or network side effects in the resource-map extractor
